SOBR Safe ( (SOBR) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 31, 2026, SOBR Safe, Inc. disclosed that its board of directors had previously scheduled the company’s 2026 annual meeting of stockholders for May 18, 2026, but has now decided to postpone that meeting to a later, unspecified date. The company said it will issue a future communication with updated details on the rescheduled annual meeting and any revised record date that will determine which stockholders are entitled to vote.

Technicals also remain bearish with the price below key moving averages and negative MACD, despite oversold readings. Added downside risk comes from the Nasdaq listing deficiency/delisting uncertainty, while valuation metrics offer limited support given a negative P/E and no dividend.

data.title: Texas Commission Approves Oncor Rate Increase Benefiting Sempra
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sempra Energy ( (SRE) ) has issued an update.

On April 17, 2026, the Public Utility Commission of Texas approved a final order in Oncor’s comprehensive base rate review, granting an annual revenue requirement of about $6.97 billion, an 8.7% increase over adjusted annualized revenues. The order also resets Oncor’s regulatory capital structure to 56.5% debt and 43.5% equity, with an authorized return on equity of 9.75% and cost of debt of 4.94%, modestly improving its allowed returns versus prior parameters.

The decision raises Oncor’s self-insurance reserve recovery in rates to $200 million annually for storm and other self-insured costs and establishes a five-year amortization period for most regulatory assets and liabilities, excluding certain specified items. Oncor expects the new rates, along with a 2026 surcharge for the difference between old and new rates from January 1, 2026 until the new tariffs take effect, to bolster future earnings, cash flow, and credit metrics, strengthening Sempra’s regulated utility earnings profile in Texas.

The most recent analyst rating on (SRE) stock is a Buy with a $105.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sempra Energy stock, see the SRE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SRE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SRE is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakening financial statement trends (recent revenue declines, uneven cash conversion with historically negative free cash flow, and 2025 operating-profit volatility). Offsetting this, technicals are positive with a strong moving-average structure and supportive momentum, while the latest earnings call provided clear long-term guidance and a funded regulated growth plan. Valuation remains a restraint due to the high P/E, with only moderate support from the dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SRE stock, click here.

More about Sempra Energy

Sempra Energy, through its majority-owned subsidiary Oncor Electric Delivery Company LLC, operates in the regulated electric utility industry, delivering electricity to customers across a large Texas service territory. Oncor’s revenues and returns are set through state regulatory proceedings, making rate cases with the Public Utility Commission of Texas a central driver of its financial performance and capital structure decisions.

Average Trading Volume: 4,024,526

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $62.37B

data.title: Forward Industries Grants Equity Package to New CFO
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Forward Industries ( (FWDI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 16, 2026, Forward Industries’ Compensation Committee approved a significant equity compensation package for recently appointed Chief Financial Officer Mark Brazier, structured to vest over time and contingent on his continued service. The package includes 275,000 stock options split between exercise prices of $9.18 and $13.77, 275,000 restricted stock units with a similar vesting schedule, and 275,000 performance stock units tied to specific SOL per share outstanding thresholds, underscoring the company’s use of performance- and tenure-linked equity to incentivize and retain key financial leadership.

The options have a 10-year term and begin vesting on April 13, 2027, with 25% vesting initially and the remaining 75% vesting in 12 equal quarterly installments, aligning Brazier’s incentives with the company’s longer-term share performance. By linking a substantial portion of the CFO’s compensation to service duration and share-related performance metrics, Forward Industries signals a focus on sustained operational discipline and shareholder alignment, which may influence both executive behavior and investor perceptions of governance rigor.

Spark’s Take on FWDI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FWDI is a Neutral.

FWDI’s score is held down primarily by severe profitability and cash-flow weakness (outsized losses and renewed cash burn), reinforced by bearish technical positioning below major moving averages. The earnings call and recent corporate actions provide partial support via rapid revenue/margin improvement tied to the SOL staking strategy, SOL-per-share accretion focus, and cost-cut/buyback initiatives, but these positives are tempered by pronounced digital-asset mark-to-market volatility and reduced liquidity.

To see Spark’s full report on FWDI stock, click here.

More about Forward Industries

On April 15, 2026, Zeo Energy Corp. delivered an investor presentation at the Webull Corporate Connect Webinar, highlighting its financial profile and business outlook, while making the materials available through its investor relations website. The company emphasized that the presentation and related disclosures are furnished rather than filed for securities law purposes and underscored extensive risk disclosures and use of non-GAAP metrics, signaling both its growth ambitions and the regulatory and market uncertainties facing its solar-focused business.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

An update from Navan, Inc. Class A ( (NAVN) ) is now available.

Navan, Inc. announced that, effective April 17, 2026, Anne Giviskos will depart from her role as Senior Vice President, Strategic Finance and Chief Accounting Officer, marking a leadership transition in the company’s finance organization. On the same date, Chief Financial Officer Aurélien Nolf will assume the additional role of principal accounting officer, consolidating financial oversight and signaling continuity in financial stewardship for the company and its stakeholders.

In connection with her departure, Giviskos will receive payments and benefits associated with a qualifying non-change-in-control termination under her existing change in control and severance agreement, indicating that the exit is being handled under previously established executive compensation terms. The structured handover to Nolf and adherence to contractual severance arrangements suggest a planned transition aimed at minimizing disruption to Navan’s financial reporting and governance processes.

The most recent analyst rating on (NAVN) stock is a Buy with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Navan, Inc. Class A stock, see the NAVN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NAVN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NAVN is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial fundamentals—continued losses and very high leverage—along with bearish technical signals. These are partially offset by a favorable earnings-call outlook (raised guidance, strong growth, and margin improvements) and positive leadership/governance events, while valuation support is limited due to negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on NAVN stock, click here.

data.title: TRAI Penalizes Vodafone Idea for Unsolicited Communication Lapses
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Vodafone Idea Ltd ( (IN:IDEA) ) has issued an announcement.

Vodafone Idea Limited has disclosed that the Telecom Regulatory Authority of India has levied a financial disincentive of Rs 21,46,000 on the company. The penalty arises from alleged failures to implement and enforce the mandated scrubbing mechanism and non-compliance with rules on unsolicited commercial communications for the quarter ended June 2024.

The company has stated that the maximum financial impact is limited to the disincentive amount and that it is reviewing the order and evaluating its next steps. While the sum is relatively small for a large telecom operator, the action underscores ongoing regulatory scrutiny over customer communication practices in India’s telecom sector and may prompt tighter internal compliance controls at Vodafone Idea.

More about Vodafone Idea Ltd

Vodafone Idea Limited is a major Indian telecommunications operator providing mobile voice and data services across the country. The company competes in a highly regulated and price-sensitive market, where compliance with telecom and customer communication norms is crucial to its operations and reputation.

Average Trading Volume: 40,748,627

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 1023.8B INR

ADF Foods Limited ( (IN:ADFFOODS) ) has issued an update.

ADF Foods Limited has responded to a query from the National Stock Exchange of India regarding a significant increase in trading volumes of its shares, stating that it has been fully compliant with disclosure norms. The company said there is currently no undisclosed or price-sensitive information, pending corporate action, or impending announcement that would explain the spike in volumes, and reiterated its commitment to promptly inform exchanges of all material developments in line with SEBI regulations.

The clarification suggests that the recent surge in trading activity is not driven by any known internal event at ADF Foods, potentially pointing to market-driven or speculative factors behind the volume jump. For investors and other stakeholders, the statement serves to confirm that there are no hidden developments within the company influencing the stock, while underscoring ADF Foods’ adherence to regulatory transparency and ongoing disclosure obligations.

data.title: Cantargia Showcases New Nadunolimab Trial in Hard-to-Treat Colorectal Cancer at AACR 2026
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cantargia AB ( (SE:CANTA) ) has issued an update.

Cantargia will present the design and supporting preclinical data for an investigator-initiated phase 1b/2 trial of its IL1RAP-targeting antibody nadunolimab combined with the anti-PD-1 drug toripalimab in chemotherapy-refractory metastatic microsatellite stable colorectal cancer at the AACR 2026 meeting. The Mount Sinai–led study, which has enrolled two of a planned 21 patients, is backed by data showing a nadunolimab surrogate reduces tumor burden, reverses immunosuppression and expands cytotoxic T cells in a colorectal cancer model otherwise resistant to immunotherapy, potentially broadening nadunolimab’s role beyond its current focus in pancreatic and lung cancer and reinforcing Cantargia’s positioning in difficult-to-treat solid tumors.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:CANTA) stock is a Buy with a SEK14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cantargia AB stock, see the SE:CANTA Stock Forecast page.

More about Cantargia AB

Cantargia AB is a Swedish biotechnology company developing antibody-based treatments for life-threatening diseases, built around the IL1RAP protein implicated in several cancers and inflammatory conditions. Its lead oncology antibody, nadunolimab (CAN04), is being clinically evaluated mainly in combination with chemotherapy for pancreatic cancer and non-small cell lung cancer, while a second program, CAN10 for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases, was acquired by Otsuka Pharmaceutical in 2025.

Average Trading Volume: 2,235,369

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK1.03B

Learn more about CANTA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
